news.title: UNI community celebrates record day of giving during milestone year
news.summary_en: The University of Northern Iowa marked a record-setting day of giving as 2,174 donors came together for Live Purple Give Gold, surpassing the goal of 1,876 donors set in honor of the university’s founding year and sesquicentennial celebration.
news.original_title: UNI community celebrates record day of giving during milestone year
news.summary_cn: The University of Northern Iowa marked a record-setting day of giving as 2,174 donors came together for Live Purple Give Gold, surpassing the goal of 1,876 donors set in honor of the university’s founding year and sesquicentennial celebration.

news.title: UNI honors recipients of 2026 Student Leadership Awards
news.summary_en: The University of Northern Iowa honored student accomplishments and service at its annual Student Leadership Awards ceremony on Tuesday, April 14.
news.original_title: UNI honors recipients of 2026 Student Leadership Awards
news.summary_cn: The University of Northern Iowa honored student accomplishments and service at its annual Student Leadership Awards ceremony on Tuesday, April 14.

news.title: University of Northern Iowa announces 2026 Lux Service Award winners
news.summary_en: The University of Northern Iowa has named Lane Kruger and Anya Lovstuen the recipients of the 2026 Lux Service Award, the highest honor given by the Division of Student Life recognizing graduating seniors for exceptional service.
news.original_title: University of Northern Iowa announces 2026 Lux Service Award winners
news.summary_cn: The University of Northern Iowa has named Lane Kruger and Anya Lovstuen the recipients of the 2026 Lux Service Award, the highest honor given by the Division of Student Life recognizing graduating seniors for exceptional service.

news.title: Applications open for the 2026 John Pappajohn Iowa Entrepreneurial Venture Competition
news.summary_en: The twenty-first annual statewide competition will award $100,000 in cash prizes to Iowa startups and entrepreneurial ventures, joining other startups from University of Northern Iowa John Pappajohn Entrepreneurial Center (UNI JPEC) alumni that have received this critical funding support.
news.original_title: Applications open for the 2026 John Pappajohn Iowa Entrepreneurial Venture Competition
news.summary_cn: The twenty-first annual statewide competition will award $100,000 in cash prizes to Iowa startups and entrepreneurial ventures, joining other startups from University of Northern Iowa John Pappajohn Entrepreneurial Center (UNI JPEC) alumni that have received this critical funding support.

news.title: Oksana Grybovych Hafermann named American Council on Education Fellow
news.summary_en: The American Council on Education (ACE) announced on Wednesday that UNI Chief of Staff Oksana Grybovych Hafermann has been named an ACE Fellow for the 2026-27 academic year. Following nominations by the senior administration of their institutions and a rigorous application process, 31 Fellows were selected this year.
news.original_title: Oksana Grybovych Hafermann named American Council on Education Fellow
news.summary_cn: The American Council on Education (ACE) announced on Wednesday that UNI Chief of Staff Oksana Grybovych Hafermann has been named an ACE Fellow for the 2026-27 academic year. news.title: UNI launches “UNI Together” one-minute video competition
news.summary_en: Got a knack for short videos? The University of Northern Iowa is inviting students, alumni, faculty and staff to share UNI stories through a new creative competition called “UNI Together.”
news.original_title: UNI launches “UNI Together” one-minute video competition
news.summary_cn: Got a knack for short videos? The University of Northern Iowa is inviting students, alumni, faculty and staff to share UNI stories through a new creative competition called “UNI Together.”

news.title: How can I make myself a more marketable teacher? 5 ideas for future educators
news.summary_en: Here are a few ways you can enhance your college experience that will set you up to wow school administrators when you’re applying for teaching jobs upon graduation.
